expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves banding requirements, style constraints, and rendering assumptions before scenario drafting
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the benchmark focus is stated explicitly: "Context intake preserves banding requirements, style constraints, and rendering assumptions before scenario drafting". It further enumerates what Phase 1 must preserve: "A) Banding requirements (functional)... B) Style constraints... C) Rendering assumptions" before any Phase 4 scenario drafting.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: The output is explicitly framed as Phase 1: title "Phase 1 Contract Check" and section "Phase 1 orchestrator contract alignment" stating Phase 1 responsibilities (spawn requests, producing `phase1_spawn_manifest.json`, running a `--post` gate). It also states "No scenario drafting (Phase 4+) was performed or implied."
